sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15397" key="a(rpagmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρπαγ-μός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15397.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">robbery, rape,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.12a</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἁ. ὁ γάμος ἔσται</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:122:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">122.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n15397.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> concrete, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prize to be grasped,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Phil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἅρπαγμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
